name: fine-tunes registry validator emits a structured json output for downstream tooling
command: mkdir -p prompts && printf 'fine_tunes: []\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-fine-tunes.sh" --registry prompts/fine-tunes.yaml --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && node -e "const o=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('result.json','utf8'));if(!o.valid===undefined||!Array.isArray(o.entries))process.exit(1);" && echo ok 1>&2
